items: Roll Call
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
RCTA Negotiations Update
CSEA Negotiations Update
Roll Call
Report Out on Closed Session from March 26, 2025
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Clifford School Presentation for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the March 12 Board Meeting Minutes
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 3280: Sale Or Lease Of District-Owned Real Property
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 3540: Transportation
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 5113.1: Chronic Absence And Truancy
Approval of Amendment No. 2 of the Joint Use Facilities Agreement between the Redwood City School District and the City of Redwood City
Approval of Amendment No. 3 to the Agreement between Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling Center for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the 2024 School Accountability Report Cards (SARCs)
Approval of the Application for Exemption from Required Classroom Teachers’ Salary Expenditures (Education Code 41372)
Public Hearing and Adoption of Resolution No. 21 Approving the Petition for Renewal of the Charter for Connect Community Charter School
Approval for the Purchase and Installation of New Combi Ovens and Braising Pans for the CNS Program
Approval of the 2024-25 Second Interim Budget Report for RCSD
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - February 2025
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' or 'Approval of the Agenda' section. Board president stated 'um does anybody have any changes modifications perfect then we can move on to approval of the agenda' indicating no items were pulled, reordered, or added.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve the agenda seconded all in favor I I great
